purpose: Assemble generation embedding and representation vectorization into the first no-mass-input Euler-Berry action hierarchy kernel.
canonical_inputs_not_mass_fitted: SM representation vectors from v0_1/v0_1 mass vectorization
generation seed candidates from twin-prime Collatz/Poincare kernel v0_4
validation_targets_only: observed fermion masses/Yukawa-derived actions are used only after assembly to check ordering
generation_assignment_rule: sort minimal twin-prime seed triplet by geometric EB action descending: largest action -> strongest suppression -> generation 1; smallest action -> weakest suppression -> generation 3

minimal_seed_triplet.assignment_rule: rank EB action descending; larger action means stronger exponential suppression
rank EB action descending; larger action means stronger exponential suppression
rank EB action descending; larger action means stronger exponential suppression

mass_action_structure.total_action: S_EB(f,g) = kappa * [ G_seed(g) + R_rep(f) + C_chiral(f) + Z_spectral(g,f) - Omega_EB(f,g) ]_+
mass_action_structure.current_v0_5_status: only G_seed ordering is assembled and validated qualitatively; R,C,Z,Omega are defined slots, not numerically frozen
